mapper.sql: id, company_name, unified_social_code, address, industry, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, cooperation_level, last_recruit_time, total_recruit_count, total_employ_count, is_warn, enterprise_status, create_user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM enterprise WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM enterprise
AND company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM enterprise
AND industry = #{industry}
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM enterprise
AND create_user_id = #{createUserId}
AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM enterprise WHERE is_warn = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enterprise (company_name, unified_social_code, address, industry, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, cooperation_level, is_warn, enterprise_status, create_user_id, is_deleted) VALUES (#{companyName}, #{unifiedSocialCode}, #{address}, #{industry}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{cooperationLevel}, 0, #{enterpriseStatus}, #{createUserId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE enterprise SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE enterprise SET total_recruit_count = total_recruit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE enterprise SET total_employ_count = total_employ_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM enterprise
AND is_deleted = 0
AND (company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND industry = #{industry}
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enterprise WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT industry, COUNT(*) AS count FROM enterprise WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND industry IS NOT NULL AND industry != '' GROUP BY industry ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
